reference: Hello. Based on your history, it seems like you have recurrent aphthous ulcers of the oral cavity. This may be due to poor dental and oral hygiene. There are some vitamin deficiencies that can also cause this. Lastly, stress may also contribute to it. Please maintain good oral hygiene by regularly brushing your teeth with proper techniques. Try to reduce stress as much as possible.
text: Hello. Based on your history, it seems like you have recurrent aphthous ulcers of the oral cavity. This may be due to poor dental and oral hygiene. There are some vitamin deficiencies that can also cause this. Lastly, stress may also contribute to it. Please maintain good oral hygiene by regularly brushing your teeth with proper techniques. Try to reduce stress as much as possible.
